label: I-405 N · AM peak (Caltrans PeMS)
source: Caltrans PeMS I-405 N corridor · full-year weekday-averaged 5-min speed+flow to GMNS · QVDF recurrent-queue calibrated. Public (PeMS).

narration.text: Corridor near free-flow (~101% of the peak reference speed). Detectors nominal; no active TIM.
Speed breaks down at 06:55 — capacity drop / onset of congestion. A recurrent queue forms; the red front propagates upstream (a shockwave moving against traffic).

Worst at 08:30 — corridor at ~75% of reference (bottleneck links far lower). Queue spillback extends upstream; secondary-crash risk window open. Candidate response: VSL harmonization, ramp metering, DMS diversion.
